backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the portfolio backend with admin claim (6-digit code), gallery image CRUD, artwork CRUD, user profiles, and media contacts, using blob storage and access control mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (admin code claim flow, public gallery section, admin gallery tab, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files describing each component's purpose, styling approach, and key functionality for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and destructive color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Khudrang Kalakaar Portfolio' that mounts the React app into a root div via the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (/, /admin-login, /admin), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider, and renders a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Two-column about section that fetches artist name, bio, and portrait from the backend, displaying them alongside static stat cards with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Renders a contact section with WhatsApp, Instagram, location, and other contact cards, fetching dynamic contact data via the useMediaContacts hook and showing skeletons while loading.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProjects: Displays a list of five static featured mural projects using the ProjectSection component, enriching each with a dynamic location pulled from the artworks API via useGetAllArtworks.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick-link scroll buttons, and static contact details; includes a hidden triple-tap logo gesture that navigates to the admin route.
frontend/src/components/GallerySection.t: Displays a responsive image gallery grid fetched via useGetGalleryImages, with loading skeletons, an empty state, and a lightbox dialog for full-size image viewing.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the full-screen hero section with a dynamic cover image, artist name, tagline, and a WhatsApp CTA button, all fetched from backend hooks with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, active section highlighting, smooth-scroll links, a mobile menu, and a hidden triple-tap logo shortcut to the admin route.
frontend/src/components/ProjectSection.t: A reusable React component that renders a single project entry with an image panel and a text panel, supporting optional reversed layout, location badge, and numbered project label.
frontend/src/components/QRSection.tsx: A section component that displays an Instagram QR code image and a follow button, fetching the Instagram profile URL from the backend via the useMediaContacts hook.
Renders a dark-themed services grid section listing six offered services (e.g., Wall Murals, Heritage Restoration) with icons, descriptions, and hover animations.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Displays a 'Why Choose Me' section with six trust-point cards (award quality, passion, timeliness, etc.), each featuring an icon, accent bar, and watermark number.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data (artworks, logo, media contacts, admin principal, etc.) and exposes mutation hooks for admin operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollSpy.ts: A hook that tracks which section ID is currently in view by listening to scroll events and comparing element offsets against the current scroll position plus an offset.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a warm artisanal OKLCH color palette with CSS custom properties for both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/lib/adminAuth.ts: Stub admin authentication module that bypasses all auth checks by always returning true for isAuthenticated and providing no-op session management functions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: Minimal AdminLogin page component that immediately redirects to the /admin route on mount and renders nothing.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Full-featured admin panel page with tabs for artworks, media, contacts, and gallery management, including upload/edit/delete operations and a 6-digit code-based admin claim flow.
frontend/src/pages/PortfolioPage.tsx: Public-facing portfolio page that composes all major sections (Hero, About, Services, Gallery, Contact, etc.) into a single page layout with Navigation and Footer.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), a warm artisanal brand color palette (terracotta, gold, cream, charcoal), and CSS variable-mapped semantic color tokens.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording the current version, architectural notes, existing implemented features, and pending feature requests for the portfolio/admin website project.
